title: realloc Semantics and Transactional Growth · Invariant Recall
summary: After a delay, a release reviewer reconstructs the amortized vector with failure invariants contract from partial traces, compares two near-miss implementations, and retrieves prior bounds and lifetime rules before feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for amortized vector with failure invariants after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Store realloc results transactionally so allocation failure preserves the original live block.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
